dimensions.label: Foundation
dimensions.evidence_required: Purpose, activation, assumptions, and constraints are explicit.

dimensions.label: Truthfulness
dimensions.evidence_required: Claims are evidence-tagged and unsupported claims are marked open.

dimensions.label: Quality
dimensions.evidence_required: Output contract, validation gate, and examples are specific.

dimensions.label: Density
dimensions.evidence_required: Instructions avoid removable filler while preserving needed context.

dimensions.label: Simplicity
dimensions.evidence_required: Concepts are introduced once with minimal duplicate explanation.

dimensions.label: Clarity
dimensions.evidence_required: Terms, activation, and outputs are unambiguous.

dimensions.label: Precision
dimensions.evidence_required: Thresholds, counts, schemas, and failure signals are measurable.

dimensions.label: Depth
dimensions.evidence_required: Edge cases, failure modes, and trade-offs are covered.

dimensions.label: Coherence
dimensions.evidence_required: Files, prompts, agents, evals, examples, and templates align.

dimensions.label: Value
dimensions.evidence_required: Every major section changes skill behavior or validation.
